rationale: The subject property (Humble, TX) is under active construction with lumber and framing materials visible. The completed upper hip-roof section shows moderate shadow depth relative to eave width and a ridge noticeably narrower than the building footprint but not dramatically so, consistent with a 6:12 pitch. All surrounding fully-built homes display near-identical hip roofs with matching shadow lengths and ridge-to-eave ratios, confirming a neighborhood norm of ~6:12. The southern Houston-area climate further supports this mid-range pitch. Confidence is reduced due to the partially unfinished state of the roof obscuring full geometry assessment.
